items.summary: Great game, especially the story. Unfortunately, my game restarts to the prologue for some reason. If anyone knows why, please do help me. I miss my account. I have been playing for a long time.

items.title:
[正面] Lovecraftian horror meets gacha. 
I love the dark...
items.summary:
Lovecraftian horror meets gacha. 
I love the dark tone of the story.
I love that this gacha hasn't been hit hard by the "hoyofication" of the gacha industry (high pity count and super fixed teams)
I love that the gacha pulls given are generous.
I love the character designs.
I love the gameplay (plays like Slay the Spire but without the roguelike elements)
I love that teambuilding is an ongoing puzzle, the devs don't just make characters to work in specific archtypes and only those archtypes.

It's a refreshing gacha in an industry where almost every gacha game is "hoyofied", but it is still a gacha at the end of the day. I recommend it

items.title:
[正面] The roguelike version of Reverse 1999. 

Despite b...
items.summary:
The roguelike version of Reverse 1999. 

Despite being on low budget, the story is still phenomenal and the art is crazy good. Cthulhu driven. 

Probably at 3.5/5 since there are some elements hinting at future P2W mechanics and the gacha currency is tied to your weekly performance (which needs meta characters at high investment). This is unlike goated gachas like PGR and Wuthering waves that curate the rewarding system so F2P and light spenders have almost same reward pulls as whales does.
